rulings.Case Title: MOHAMMED RIBHI AYESH VS. SUKHDEVJI D. PATEL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 27, 2013, line 1. Plaintiff Mohammed Ribhi's Motion To Compel Arbitration GRANT - Arbitration paragraph 21 of the lease agreement is explicit that any dispute is to be arbitrated. = (501/REQ)
